allow: Bash(node -e "const yf = require\(''yahoo-finance2''\); console.log\(typeof yf.default, Object.keys\(yf\).slice\(0,10\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import yahooFinance from ''yahoo-finance2''; const yf = new yahooFinance\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(yf\)\).filter\(n => !n.startsWith\(''_''\)\)\)")
